goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'london liverpool street' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should 'leave after 09:15' and should leave on 'friday'.
Make sure you get 'price', 'train ID', and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'alpha-milton guest house'.
Make sure you get 'area'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.
